about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Code, coke, and systems that run.
about.desc: I'm 20 and I spend my time testing out new tech. I don't fit into a box: I explore, I break things, and I build them back better. My projects speak for themselves.
about.goal2: Deepening in Cybersecurity and System Hardening.
about.goal3: Development of skills in programming and 3D modeling for creating MODs and indie games.
about.path1: CTeSP CRSI (Portugal): two-year higher education track in IT equipment management, cybersecurity, and networking.
about.path2: Internship at Talhes (France) in the IT department.
about.path3: Internship at Proxsys Solutions (Portugal) focused on cybersecurity, networking, and internal tool development.

botnet.pageTitle: The Infinite BotNet - Playable Prototype - DevByFab
botnet.title: The Infinite BotNet
botnet.subtitle: From garage script to network singularity, no brakes.
botnet.analyticsDesc: Live telemetry across frequency mining, neural extraction, and matrix pressure.
botnet.upgradeScannerDesc: Automates target discovery at 1 IP per second.
botnet.upgradeWordlistDesc: Exploit loop runs 2x faster and becomes more reliable.
botnet.upgradeRapidDesc: Early tempo branch: cuts scan-to-target friction and speeds exploit cadence.
botnet.upgradeAsyncDesc: Adds an autonomous exploit lane, even without other upgrades.
botnet.upgradeWormDesc: Raw acceleration branch with heavy scan and exploit throughput gains.
botnet.upgradeStealthDesc: Profit branch: stronger payload reliability plus monetization efficiency.
botnet.upgradeOrchestratorDesc: High-scale automation spike to prepare massive late thresholds.
botnet.upgradeInfectBoost1Desc: Independent precision pack to smooth out failure streaks.
botnet.upgradeInfectBoost2Desc: Extra precision tier that does not require a strict chain.
botnet.upgradeInfectBoost3Desc: Final precision layer for stable late-game infection flow.
botnet.upgradeScanCluster1Desc: Scanner throughput option (same tier as Exploit Swarm I).
botnet.upgradeScanCluster2Desc: Advanced scanner option (same tier as Exploit Swarm II).
botnet.upgradeExploitSwarm1Desc: Exploit throughput option (same tier as Scanner Cluster I).
botnet.upgradeExploitSwarm2Desc: Advanced exploit option (same tier as Scanner Cluster II).
botnet.upgradeGhostProtocolDesc: Stabilizes stealth warfare and opens silent ending routes.
botnet.upgradeNeuralLureDesc: War aggression scales harder and improves high-tier conversion pressure.
botnet.marketDesc: Convert bots into dark money and choose multiple economy levers at the same tier.
botnet.marketDarkAuctionDesc: First yield lever to boost conversion speed and output.
botnet.marketQuantumDesc: Second financial lever, stackable without linear prerequisites.
botnet.marketFutures1Desc: Mid-game market module that keeps conversion pressure high.
botnet.marketFutures2Desc: Late-game market module for sustained long-run scaling.
botnet.investDesc: Deploy dark money in stable or aggressive strategies to accelerate run completion.
botnet.investAggressiveHint: Aggressive mode can spike gains but increases hostile event risk.
botnet.investVentureDeskDesc: Unlocks larger tranches and safer baseline yield.
botnet.investRiskHedgerDesc: Improves aggressive gains while reducing volatility spikes.
botnet.investQuantFundDesc: Significantly raises stable returns and batch capacity.
botnet.investAiTraderDesc: Endgame investment layer with bigger entries and controlled aggression.
botnet.warDesc: Attack rival AI clusters while managing Heat and global detection pressure.
botnet.warHeatSinkDesc: Cuts baseline Heat growth and boosts cooldown recovery behavior.
botnet.warObfuscatorDesc: Adds strong defense against detection spikes during monetization.
botnet.warForgeDesc: Improves strike success and amplifies spoils from victories.
botnet.warPredatoryProxyDesc: Aggressive financial warfare layer with faster strike cadence.
botnet.matrixDesc: Arm daemon bypass, inject signed F12 payloads, and stabilize before watchdog backlash.
botnet.endingsDesc: Your route reshapes the portfolio archive. Pick your final protocol.
botnet.endingTriadHint: Triad Sigil online: all routes unlocked. The archive is now unstable.
botnet.upgradeZeroDayDesc: Instant bot injection, reusable and scaling with current botnet size.
botnet.saveHint: Autosave runs every 10 seconds. You can also export/import Base64 manually.
botnet.settingsHint: All game settings will progressively be grouped here.
botnet.turboHint: Temporarily speed up simulation to verify full progression quickly.
botnet.savePlaceholder: Paste an export string here to import...
botnet.inboxDesc: Process intercepted mails to gain tactical boosts.
botnet.tutorialHint: Need a refresher? Replay the onboarding any time.
botnet.lockedFeatureHint: Feature locked. Keep scaling your botnet.
botnet.tutorialStep1Body: Start by scanning vulnerable IPs, then exploit them to grow your swarm.
botnet.tutorialStep1Action: Start with one scan, then exploit once the cooldown is ready.
botnet.tutorialStep1Checklist: Press SCAN to queue targets.|Press EXPLOIT when READY to create bots.
botnet.tutorialStep2Body: Automation upgrades accelerate scans and exploits. Buy them as soon as your bots allow.
botnet.tutorialStep2Action: Buy one available upgrade to automate your core loop.
botnet.tutorialStep2Checklist: Find a row without lock prerequisites.|Buy one affordable scanner or exploit upgrade.
botnet.tutorialStep3Body: Use Market and Investment tabs to convert swarm power into long-run money growth.
botnet.tutorialStep3Action: Use monetization for cash, then reinvest to speed growth.
botnet.tutorialStep3Checklist: Toggle monetization when bots are stable.|Use investment actions when dark money is available.
botnet.tutorialStep4Body: Messages can help or hurt. Process rewards or pay to quarantine dangerous ones.
botnet.tutorialStep4Action: Process useful messages and quarantine harmful ones.
botnet.tutorialStep4Checklist: Check reward color and sign before acting.|Process positive rewards, quarantine dangerous entries.
botnet.tutorialStep5Body: High Heat increases threats. Scrub traces, fortify defenses, and strike rivals carefully.
botnet.tutorialStep5Action: Keep Heat controlled before launching repeated strikes.
botnet.tutorialStep5Checklist: Use SCRUB when Heat climbs too high.|Use DEFENSE PULSE before long attack sequences.
botnet.tutorialStep6Body: Late-game systems unlock powerful routes. Choose your final protocol in Endings.
botnet.tutorialStep6Action: Arm bypass, inject the right command, then stabilize.
botnet.tutorialStep6Checklist: Follow the command hint exactly.|Balance inject actions with matrix stabilization.
clipython.title: Python CLI — Hybrid Cryptography
clipython.subtitle: Command-line tool for hybrid file and message encryption, with RSA/AES key management.
clipython.overviewTitle: A compact terminal workflow for secure file handling
clipython.overviewDesc: The CLI keeps the flow direct: generate keys, encrypt payloads, and restore them with a predictable sequence that avoids unnecessary noise.
clipython.m1.title: 1. Hybrid Encryption Core
clipython.m1.desc: RSA protects the exchange while AES handles the payload. The workflow stays explicit from key generation to decryption.
clipython.m1.i1: RSA-2048 handles secure key exchange before any payload work starts.
clipython.m1.i2: AES-256-CBC keeps bulk encryption fast and practical for real files.
clipython.m1.i3: Each step is staged so the security flow stays deterministic and easy to reason about.
clipython.m2.title: 2. File & Message Workflow
clipython.m2.desc: Text and binary files use the same entry points, so the CLI stays compact even when switching targets.
clipython.m2.i1: Encrypt and decrypt short messages without changing the overall workflow.
clipython.m2.i2: Handle binary files through the same interface for a consistent user path.
clipython.m2.i3: Keep validation and error handling visible instead of hiding failures behind abstractions.
clipython.m3.title: 3. Key Management & Keystore
clipython.m3.desc: Generate, export, import, and organize key pairs for repeatable secure sessions.
clipython.m3.i1: Create RSA key pairs from the CLI without leaving the workflow.
clipython.m3.i2: Export and import keys to support reusable sessions and multiple environments.
clipython.m3.i3: Keep a structured keystore so future automation stays predictable.
clipython.m4.title: 4. Terminal UX & Feedback
clipython.m4.desc: Menus, progress cues, and color-coded output make the tool readable even in long sessions.
clipython.m4.i1: Use compact menus so the CLI stays fast to navigate.
clipython.m4.i2: Surface progress and state clearly during longer operations.
clipython.m4.i3: Keep errors readable so debugging stays practical instead of opaque.
cryo.title: CryoTabs: RAM Optimizer & Workspace Manager
cryo.subtitle: An ultra-light Chromium extension (~400 KB), built with Manifest V3 to reduce memory pressure and structure tab-heavy workflows.
cryo.overviewTitle: Performance and privacy first, SaaS-ready by design
cryo.overviewDesc: CryoTabs avoids heavy frameworks and intrusive injection patterns. V1 focuses on local reliability and low memory usage, while the internal data model is already prepared for a Freemium cloud sync architecture in V2.
cryo.problem.title: Market Problem: Heavy tab managers that waste RAM
cryo.problem.desc: Most competitors became bloated products: large payloads, aggressive scripts, and fragile async sync logic.
cryo.problem.i1: Many solutions consume several MB and inject logic into every page context.
cryo.problem.i2: The extension itself can consume more resources than it actually saves.
cryo.problem.i3: Async Chrome APIs frequently cause tab duplication bugs during state synchronization.
cryo.problem.i4: Users need reliability, speed, and control without cloud lock-in from day one.
cryo.m1.title: 1. Zero-Duplication Workspace Engine
cryo.m1.desc: Persistent workspaces are backed by strict local synchronization rules to keep tab state coherent.
cryo.m1.i1: Logical workspace grouping with persistence in chrome.storage.local.
cryo.m1.i2: Lifecycle-aware listeners track creation, updates, moves, and closures.
cryo.m1.i3: State mismatch handling prevents corruption when tabs disappear mid-save.
cryo.m1.i4: Deduplication safeguards block duplicate tab records during concurrent events.
cryo.m2.title: 2. Smart Sleep Engine for RAM Optimization
cryo.m2.desc: Inactive tabs are discarded in the background to reduce memory pressure while preserving user flow.
cryo.m2.i1: Automated tab discard for inactive sessions and hidden workloads.
cryo.m2.i2: Domain whitelist for critical web apps that must stay fully active.
cryo.m2.i3: Regex whitelist mode for power users with advanced matching needs.
cryo.m2.i4: Time-based scheduling to enable or disable optimization by hour.
cryo.m3.title: 3. Known Good State Snapshot Recovery
cryo.m3.desc: A panic-safe restore path lets users recover a fully functional workspace state in one click.
cryo.m3.i1: Manual recovery button to revert from bad edits or accidental cleanup.
cryo.m3.i2: Quota-aware design respects the 5 MB storage limit from Chrome.
cryo.m3.i3: Auto-clean policy keeps only one snapshot by replacing the previous backup.
cryo.m3.i4: Maximum safety for the user with minimal storage footprint.
cryo.m4.title: 4. Progressive Disclosure UI/UX
cryo.m4.desc: The interface is intentionally compact: essential controls first, advanced controls on demand.
cryo.m4.i1: Main popup limited to 6 essential actions for low-friction operation.
cryo.m4.i2: Native dark/light adaptation based on system preferences.
cryo.m4.i3: Advanced parameters isolated in dedicated dropdown sections.
cryo.m4.i4: Built-in i18n with automatic language detection and 3-language support.
cryo.m5.title: 5. Lightweight Stack & Code Quality Discipline
cryo.m5.desc: The implementation favors deterministic behavior, low overhead, and long-term maintainability.
cryo.m5.i1: HTML5, CSS3, and Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+) without heavy frameworks.
cryo.m5.i2: Strict Manifest V3 architecture with ephemeral service worker lifecycle.
cryo.m5.i3: Approximate package size of 400 KB, significantly lighter than typical alternatives.
cryo.m5.i4: Static analysis and cleanup via SonarQube and ESLint, including dead code removal and leak prevention.
cryo.m6.title: 6. SaaS V2 Roadmap: Cloud Sync & Premium Layer
cryo.m6.desc: V1 already embeds sync-ready markers to support a smooth transition to a cross-device freemium cloud model.
cryo.m6.i1: Cross-browser and cross-device workspace sync across Chromium environments.
cryo.m6.i2: Google OAuth for passwordless, low-friction secure authentication.
cryo.m6.i3: Supabase PostgreSQL backend with TLS in transit, encryption at rest, and RLS data isolation.
cryo.m6.i4: Public one-click workspace sharing links for viral adoption scenarios.
cryo.m6.i5: Monetization planned with Lemon Squeezy as Merchant of Record.
discordbot.title: BoTokard: Functional Capabilities
discordbot.subtitle: A Python Discord bot designed as an asynchronous control layer between community interactions, game logic, and external APIs.
discordbot.overviewDesc: BoTokard does more than answer commands. It orchestrates gameplay, moderation, engagement features, and live operations while staying connected to a shared MySQL data model used by the web ecosystem.
discordbot.m1.title: 1. TCG Engine & Cross-Platform Economy
discordbot.m1.desc: The bot owns the complete game loop and keeps player state consistent between Discord and the web app.
discordbot.m1.i1: Secure player profile bootstrap with live tracking of XP, levels, cards, and items.
discordbot.m1.i2: Gacha and RNG pipeline with conditional drops, including special fragment assembly events.
discordbot.m1.i3: Fraud-resistant trade flow with anti-duplication and transactional consistency checks.
discordbot.m1.i4: Automated quests, achievements, and battle pass progression to reinforce retention.
discordbot.m2.title: 2. Gemini AI Integration & Engagement Tools
discordbot.m2.desc: BoTokard boosts interaction quality and community retention with adaptive AI and interactive tools.
discordbot.m2.i1: Context-aware conversational agent using Google Gemini API for adaptive replies.
discordbot.m2.i2: Dynamic poll interfaces through Discord UI components with live vote tracking.
discordbot.m2.i3: RNG and hash-based mini-games for text-channel engagement and community rituals.
discordbot.m2.i4: Feature set designed to keep channels active without flooding moderation teams.
discordbot.m3.title: 3. Database Audit Trail & Moderation
discordbot.m3.desc: A professional moderation module built for high-traffic servers and full accountability.
discordbot.m3.i1: Advanced sanction commands for warns, mutes, kicks, bans, and safe bulk purges.
discordbot.m3.i2: Every moderation action is persisted in MySQL for complete traceability.
discordbot.m3.i3: On-demand lookup of user disciplinary records directly inside Discord.
discordbot.m3.i4: Automatic log routing for moderation events, TCG transactions, and system errors.
discordbot.m4.title: 4. Twitch Broadcast Control Interface
discordbot.m4.desc: The bot acts as a streaming assistant through secure, bidirectional Twitch API integrations.
discordbot.m4.i1: Secure commands to update live metadata such as stream title and category.
discordbot.m4.i2: Webhook listeners that announce stream starts with rich-formatted alerts.
discordbot.m4.i3: Clip generation workflow with manual fallback to guarantee highlight capture.
discordbot.m4.i4: Runtime monitoring designed for reliable show control from Discord.
discordbot.m5.title: 5. High-Fidelity Audio Streaming
discordbot.m5.desc: A robust asynchronous media player designed for dependable voice channel playback.
discordbot.m5.i1: Playback state machine covering play, pause, resume, and hard stop.
discordbot.m5.i2: Dynamic queue structure for collaborative song stacking in real time.
discordbot.m5.i3: Advanced queue controls with single-track loop and full playlist loop.
discordbot.m5.i4: Built for resilient operation under concurrent user commands.
